title: Agents
subtitle: Create and manage your AI agents
emptyState: No agents yet. Create your first agent to get started.
deleteDialogDescription: This agent will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
publishDialogDescription: Once published, this agent will be available for use in conversations.
unpublishDialogDescription: This agent will be set back to draft and no longer available in conversations.
startChatTooltip: Start a new conversation with this agent
unsavedChangesDescription: You have unsaved changes. Leaving this page will discard them.
descriptionPlaceholder: A brief description of what this agent does...
instructionsPlaceholder: System prompt for the agent. Tell it how to behave, what to focus on...
executionModeDescription: Sets the default mode for new conversations. You can still switch modes anytime during a chat.
generalModelDesc: Used for reasoning, planning, and analysis.
fastModelDesc: Used for DAG step execution and summaries.
temperatureDescription: Controls randomness. Lower = focused, higher = creative. Leave as Default to use the server setting.
sandboxDescription: Resource limits for code execution tools. Only applies when using Docker backend (CODE_EXEC_BACKEND=docker).
toolCategoriesHint: Hover over a category to see what tools it includes.
toolCategoryConnectorDesc: Access external API actions bound to this agent
toolCategoryConnectorTools: Custom HTTP connectors, CRM, Slack, and more
toolCategoryKnowledgeDesc: Query knowledge bases for grounded answers with citations
toolCategoryKnowledgeTools: KB Retrieve, Grounded Retrieve, KB List
toolCategoryWebDesc: Browse the internet and search for information
toolCategoryWebTools: Web Search, Web Fetch, HTTP Request
toolCategoryComputationDesc: Run math calculations and execute Python code
toolCategoryFilesystemDesc: Read, write, and manage local files
toolCategoryFilesystemTools: File Read, File Write, File List, and more
toolCategoryMcpDesc: Tools provided by external MCP servers
toolCategoryGeneralTools: Utility tools without a specific category
knowledgeBasesDescription: Bind KBs to enable evidence-grounded retrieval with citations
confidenceDescription: When set, answers with confidence below this threshold will be rejected. Leave off to always show results.
connectorsDescription: Bind connectors to give the agent access to external API actions
suggestedPromptsDescription: Shown as quick-start suggestions in chat.
saveFirst: Save the agent first to use AI assistant
describeCreate: Describe the agent you want to create...
describeModify: Describe how to modify this agent...
aiWillConfigure: AI will configure settings for you
aiWillApply: AI will apply your requested changes
aiCreatePlaceholder: e.g. Create an agent that helps with customer support...
aiRefinePlaceholder: e.g. Add web search capability and update instructions...
aiCreatedSuccess: Agent created. Settings have been populated.
aiModifiedSuccess: Agent modified. Check the updated settings.
saveSettingsFirst: Please save your agent settings first.
aiError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
